visual_description: A close-up shot focuses on a man with slicked-back hair and thin-rimmed glasses. He wears a white collared shirt and a dark tie. His expression is serious and contemplative as he looks slightly downward. The background is a solid, muted green wall. The audio consists of a series of sharp, percussive sounds. It begins with a loud, crisp snap, like a belt buckle being fastened or a button being pushed into place. The camera angle shifts slightly, showing more of the man's profile as he turns his head. He is now seen wearing a dark suit jacket over his shirt and tie. The background remains the same green wall, with a dark, out-of-focus shape to the left. This is followed by a quick, rustling whoosh, as if a piece of clothing or fabric is being moved rapidly. The man turns his head further, looking down and to his right. The camera follows his movement, maintaining a close-up. The background is still the green wall, with a wooden door frame visible in the distance. The sequence concludes with a soft, muffled thud, suggesting something has been placed down or has made contact with a surface. The shot cuts to a different man, who is older with more wrinkled
